## Detection signal checklist (if applicable)

- [ ] Signal is based on a stable attribute (data-pagelet, aria-label, role, URL pattern)
- [ ] Signal does NOT rely on CSS class names
- [ ] Signal does NOT read full post textContent
- [ ] Signal handles multiple interface languages (or languages are explicitly listed)
